title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates:
iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq Asia Pacific Associates!
